channel.title: Global Health Access Trust - Impact & Insights
channel.description: Stories of healthcare justice, policy insights, and programme updates from the field.

item.title: Strengthening Rural Healthcare Networks in East Africa
item.description: Exploring innovative approaches to connecting remote health facilities with urban medical centres through digital health technologies and sustainable training programmes.
item.author: operations@globalhealthaccesstrust.com (Dr. Amara Okafor)

item.title: Training Healthcare Workers in Crisis Settings
item.description: How targeted training programmes can rapidly build healthcare capacity in emergency contexts whilst ensuring quality care and professional development.
item.author: operations@globalhealthaccesstrust.com (Dr. Elena Rodriguez)

item.title: Policy Reform and Healthcare Access in South Asia
item.description: Examining the intersection of health policy and access equity across South Asian healthcare systems, with focus on sustainable reform pathways.
item.author: operations@globalhealthaccesstrust.com (Professor James Wilson)
